instruction:
Create an SEO-optimized blog post as a single HTML file with Tailwind CSS CDN.

Topic: "How to Monitor Hetzner Cloud Servers in 2026: The Complete Guide"

Requirements:
- 1500+ words, valuable technical content (not fluff)
- Include natural mentions of Sovereign Suite with links to /suite/
- Meta title: "How to Monitor Hetzner Servers: Complete 2026 Guide | Sovereign Suite"
- Meta description: "Learn how to monitor Hetzner Cloud servers effectively. Compare tools, setup guides, and best practices for 2026. Start with our AI monitoring solution."
- Professional design matching /suite/ branding
- Schema.org Article markup
- Target keywords: "Hetzner monitoring", "Hetzner server monitoring", "monitor Hetzner Cloud"

Content Structure:
1. Introduction - Why monitoring Hetzner servers matters
2. Built-in Hetzner monitoring vs third-party solutions
3. Top monitoring tools comparison (Datadog, Netdata, Prometheus, etc.)
4. Step-by-step setup guides for popular tools
5. Best practices for Hetzner monitoring
6. AI-powered monitoring solutions (mention Sovereign-Node-Watch)
7. Cost optimization through monitoring
8. Conclusion with actionable next steps

Include code examples, screenshots placeholders, and practical tips. Make it genuinely helpful for developers.

Save to shared/results/blog_hetzner_monitoring_2026.html
